title: The Book of Kadam: Atisha's Teachings in Tibet
description: The core teachings Atisha brought from India to Tibet — the foundation of all Tibetan Buddhist lineages.
introduction: The core teachings Atisha brought from India to Tibet — the foundation of all Tibetan Buddhist lineages.

translation.text: When I arrived in Tibet, I was asked: 'What is the essence of all the teachings?' I said: 'The essence is this: refrain from all harmful actions, perform only virtuous ones, and tame your own mind. This is the teaching of all the buddhas.'
